summary: Prepare for a financial audit including document organization, control testing, workpaper preparation, and findings pre-assessment.

inputs.name: audit_scope
inputs.description: Audit scope, period, and objectives from the audit plan.

inputs.name: financial_records
inputs.description: Financial records and supporting documentation for the audit period.

inputs.name: control_documentation
inputs.description: Internal control documentation and prior audit findings.

outputs.name: audit_readiness_report
outputs.description: Assessment of audit readiness with gaps and action items.

outputs.name: document_index
outputs.description: Organized index of audit documents and workpapers.

outputs.name: control_assessment
outputs.description: Pre-audit control testing results and gap identification.

budget.notes: High-stakes workflow. Preserve documentation standards and reviewer handoff.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is financial audit preparation and not security or IT audit.
Require audit scope and financial records before any preparation work begins.
Mark all assessments as decision support and attach disclaimer before external sharing.
End with named human audit owner or reviewer handoff; do not claim audit completion.

steps.action: Review audit scope, identify required documents, and create preparation checklist.
Organize financial records, create document index, and identify gaps.
Pre-test key controls, document results, and identify control gaps.
Compile readiness assessment with gaps, action items, and timeline to audit readiness.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read financial records, control documentation, and prior audit reports.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Write audit preparation documents when requested.

verification.method: Check all required documents are indexed with gap identification.
Check key controls have been pre-tested with documented results.
Check output includes disclaimer and named reviewer handoff.

success_criteria: The preparation covers all audit scope areas with organized documentation.
Key controls are pre-tested with results and gap identification.
The final output explicitly states it is preparation support and requires human audit owner review.

rollback.when: If documents are missing or controls are untested, revert to the relevant preparation step.
